---
title: "Clara de Havilland Wickham"
---

## Clara de Havilland Wickham

### Description

wife of the Rev. Charles Wickham, Rector of Compton

### Biography

This seems likely to be the ‘Mrs Wickham of Compton’ to whom CMY refers. [1891 census]

### Letters

- Letter from January 27 [1886]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
